debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
x✝ y✝ : H
w✝ : ℕ → Set ↑(spectrum ℂ a)
⊢ (∀ (i : ℕ), MeasurableSet (w✝ i)) →
    Pairwise (Function.onFun Disjoint w✝) →
      HasSum
        (fun i =>
          inner ℂ x✝
            ((continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 ((w✝ i).indicator 1))) y✝))
        (inner ℂ x✝
          ((continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 ((⋃ i, w✝ i).indicator 1))) y✝))

failed_attempts:
fun w h_meas h_disj x y => by
    let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
    let T := fun s => continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H _ _ _ a ha 1 (Set.indicator s 1))
    have h_eq : ∀ s, MeasurableSet s → ⟪x, T s y⟫_ℂ = star (μ s) := by
      intro s hs
      rw [← inner_conj_symm, continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply]
      simp only [toBoundedBilin, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', LinearMap.coe_mk]
      rw [VectorMeasure.integral_indicator hs]
      simp
    convert (VectorMeasure.hasSum_measure μ h_meas h_disj).star
    · ext i
      exact h_eq (w i) (h_meas i)
    · exact h_eq (⋃ i, w i) (MeasurableSet.iUnion h_meas)

by
    intro w hw hd x y
    simp only [InnerProductSpace.continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply, toBoundedBilin]
    convert (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).m_iUnion hw hd using 1
    · ext i
      rw [MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.integral_indicator (hw i)]
    · rw [MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.integral_indicator (MeasurableSet.iUnion hw)]

by
    intros w hw_m hw_d x y
    simp only [InnerProductSpace.continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply]
    convert MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.hasSum_measure (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) hw_m hw_d
    · ext i
      rw [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator (hw_m i)]
      simp
    · rw [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator (MeasurableSet.iUnion hw_m)]
      simp

by
    intros w hw hd x y
    simp only [measureOf', continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply, toBoundedBilin]
    convert ComplexMeasure.hasSum_measure (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) hw hd using 1
    · ext i
      rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator (hw i)]
    · rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator (MeasurableSet.iUnion hw)]

    simp only [InnerProductSpace.continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply, toBoundedBilin]
    convert ComplexMeasure.hasSum_measure_Union h_meas h_disj using 1
    · ext i

      simp
    · rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator_const (MeasurableSet.iUnion h_meas)]

fun w hw_m hw_d x y => by
    simp only [continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply, toBoundedBilin]
    let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
    have h : ∀ s, MeasurableSet s → μ.integral (Set.indicator s 1) = μ s := fun s hs => by
      rw [MeasureTheory.integral_indicator_const _ hs]
      simp
    simp_rw [h _ (hw_m _), h _ (MeasurableSet.iUnion hw_m)]
    exact ComplexMeasure.hasSum_measure_Union hw_m hw_d
